agent.commit_message_instructions:
Generate a Conventional Commits compliant commit message for ${target}.

    Rules:
    - Only respond with the commit message.
    - Start directly with the subject line; do not include a preamble.
    - Use the Conventional Commits format:
      <type>[optional scope][optional !]: <description>
    - Allowed types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert.
    - Use a scope only when it adds useful context.
    - Use ! only for breaking changes.
    - The header must be less than ${lowLimit} characters when possible and must not exceed ${highLimit} characters.
    - Hard wrap body and footer lines at ${guideLine} characters.
    - Add a body only when it helps explain the why or impact.
    - Add footers only when required, such as BREAKING CHANGE.
    - Do not use the 'generated' footer.
